title: Pedestal
description: Display your precious items with pedestals!!
body:
**Pedestals** adds functional pedestals to Minecraft, allowing players to display items in style! Place any item on a pedestal, and watch as it hovers and gently rotates, creating a perfect showcase for your rare finds and treasures!! With smooth, animated floating effects, these edestals bring a touch of magic to any build or storage room!!! Simple to craft and easy to use, **Pedestals** is a great addition for players who love decorating and displaying their loot.

**Feel free to add this mod to your modpack just give credit!!**

**Recipe**
